docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUEN, CECIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLOWAY, DANNEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR AND DID NOT FOLLOW THROUGH WITH THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ONLY (FOR CLAIM AND ORDER)

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-10-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-31-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO DANNEN HOLLOWAY RETURNED--ADDRESS UNKNOWN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SUEN, CECIL AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLOWAY, DANNEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
